title: JavaScript Browser Object Model (BOM) Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of window, location, history, and navigator objects in JavaScript.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the global object for all browser-based JavaScript?
Which object contains all current page URL-related properties like href and hostname?
What is the result of calling history.back()?
options: It takes the user to the previous page in their browse history.
It jumps to the top of the current page.

questions.question: Which property in the navigator object can you use to check if the browser is online?
Which of the following properties returns the width of the visitor's browser window (in pixels)?
